events.desc: Wood-fired artisan pizzas made fresh to order. The perfect pairing for a cold pint.

events.desc: We couldn't think of a better way to kick off our 2.0 launch than with live bluegrass and folk music. Granny Takes a Trip is hitting the stage as a newly minted trio to bring you old-school tunes and great vibes. Come grab a fresh beer and let the boys take you on a whole new trip!
events.title: Patio Sessions: Granny Takes a Trip

events.desc: Loaded nachos and bold Mexican flavours. Hard to stop at one round.

events.desc: Fresh hibachi and Japanese favourites, cooked right outside on the patio.

events.desc: Teams accumulate points for quarterly gift certificates. Solo play welcome — grab a beer and give it a go.

events.desc: $1 off every beer when you bring your pup. Water and treats provided. Always a pet-friendly space.
